001package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus;
002
003import org.apache.commons.lang3.Validate;
004import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic;
005import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.helpers.Bytes;
006import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.Message;
007import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType;
008import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.annotations.MessageProps;
009import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.models.KnownApiVersion;
010import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus.CommonSoftwareInfoResponse;
011
012/**
013 * Requests software info for a specific MCU type.
014 */
015/**
016 * Requests software info for a specific MCU type.
017 *
018
019 *
020 * <br>
021 *
022 * Request message for {@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus.CommonSoftwareInfoResponse}, opCode -114, size 1
023 *
024 * <br>
025 *
026 * 
027 * <table border='1'>
028 * <caption>Message properties:</caption>
029 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>opCode</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>-114</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
030 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>size</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>1</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
031 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>type</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType#REQUEST}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
032 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>characteristic</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic#CURRENT_STATUS}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
033 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>response</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus.CommonSoftwareInfoResponse}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
034 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>minApi</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.models.KnownApiVersion#API_FUTURE}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
035 * </table>
036 */@MessageProps(
037    opCode=-114,
038    size=1,
039    type=MessageType.REQUEST,
040    characteristic=Characteristic.CURRENT_STATUS,
041    response=CommonSoftwareInfoResponse.class,
042    minApi=KnownApiVersion.API_FUTURE
043)
044public class CommonSoftwareInfoRequest extends Message {
045    private int mcuTypeId;
046    private MCUType mcuType;
047
048    public CommonSoftwareInfoRequest() {
049        this(MCUType.ARM);
050    }
051
052    public CommonSoftwareInfoRequest(int mcuTypeId) {
053        this.cargo = buildCargo(mcuTypeId);
054        this.mcuTypeId = mcuTypeId;
055        this.mcuType = MCUType.fromId(mcuTypeId);
056    }
057
058    public CommonSoftwareInfoRequest(MCUType mcuType) {
059        this(mcuType.id());
060    }
061
062    public CommonSoftwareInfoRequest(byte[] raw) {
063        parse(raw);
064    }
065
066    /**
067     * <table border="1">
068     * <caption>Parsed fields for CommonSoftwareInfoRequest:</caption>
069     * <tr><td><code>mcuTypeId</code></td><td><code>raw[0] &amp; 0xFF</code></td></tr>
070     * <tr><td><code>mcuType</code></td><td><code>MCUType.fromId(mcuTypeId)</code></td></tr>
071     * </table>
072     */
073    public void parse(byte[] raw) {
074        Validate.isTrue(raw.length == props().size());
075        this.cargo = raw;
076        this.mcuTypeId = raw[0] & 0xFF;
077        this.mcuType = MCUType.fromId(mcuTypeId);
078    }
079
080    public static byte[] buildCargo(int mcuType) {
081        return new byte[]{ (byte) mcuType };
082    }
083
084    public int getMcuTypeId() {
085        return mcuTypeId;
086    }
087
088    public MCUType getMcuType() {
089        return mcuType;
090    }
091
092    public enum MCUType {
093        ARM(0),
094        BLE(1),
095        MSP(2),
096        UNKNOWN(3),
097        ;
098
099        private final int id;
100        MCUType(int id) {
101            this.id = id;
102        }
103
104        public int id() {
105            return id;
106        }
107
108        public static MCUType fromId(int id) {
109            for (MCUType m : values()) {
110                if (m.id == id) return m;
111            }
112            return UNKNOWN;
113        }
114    }
115}
